<?php /** * This file is part of the Nette Framework (https://nette.org) * Copyright (c) 2004 David Grudl (https://davidgrudl.com) */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Nette\Localization; /** * Translation provider. */ interface Translator { /** * Translates the given string. */ function translate(string|\Stringable $message, mixed ...$parameters): string|\Stringable; } interface_exists(ITranslator::class);
